sanitizers.expression: $wpdb->prepare('SELECT table_name AS "table", data_length as size,table_type as type FROM information_schema.TABLES WHERE table_schema = %s', $db)
wp_kses(__('Install and activate the Worker plugin.', 'worker'), array('b' => array()))

wp_kses($contactText, array(
                            'a'      => array('href' => array(), 'target' => array(), 'rel' => array()),
                            'b'      => array(),
                            'strong' => array(),
                            'em'     => array(),
                            'i'      => array(),
                            'br'     => array(),
                            'span'   => array('class' => array()),
                        ))

wp_kses($string, array(
            'a'      => array(
                'href' => true
            ),
            'br'     => true,
            'em'     => true,
            'strong' => true,
        ))
